'''竏營h-sh-ng''' ('''kazhashang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whang|whang]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whang|whang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營h-sh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kazhashang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhashang|thizhashang]] || [[word:jizhashang|jizhashang]] || [[word:shizhashang|shizhashang]] || [[word:kizhashang|kizhashang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhashang|thuthuzhashang]] || [[word:jujuzhashang|jujuzhashang]] || [[word:shushuzhashang|shushuzhashang]] || [[word:kukuzhashang|kukuzhashang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhashang|thuzhashang]] || [[word:juzhashang|juzhashang]] || [[word:shuzhashang|shuzhashang]] || [[word:kuzhashang|kuzhashang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhashang|thuzhashang]] || [[word:juzhashang|juzhashang]] || [[word:shuzhashang|shuzhashang]] || [[word:kuzhashang|kuzhashang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhashang|thezhashang]] || [[word:jezhashang|jezhashang]] || [[word:shezhashang|shezhashang]] || [[word:kezhashang|kezhashang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhashang|thothozhashang]] || [[word:jojozhashang|jojozhashang]] || [[word:shoshozhashang|shoshozhashang]] || [[word:kokozhashang|kokozhashang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhashang|thozhashang]] || [[word:jozhashang|jozhashang]] || [[word:shozhashang|shozhashang]] || [[word:kozhashang|kozhashang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhashang|thozhashang]] || [[word:jozhashang|jozhashang]] || [[word:shozhashang|shozhashang]] || [[word:kozhashang|kozhashang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzhashang|thﾃｦzhashang]] || [[word:jﾃｦzhashang|jﾃｦzhashang]] || [[word:shﾃｦzhashang|shﾃｦzhashang]] || [[word:kﾃｦzhashang|kﾃｦzhashang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhashang|thathazhashang]] || [[word:jajazhashang|jajazhashang]] || [[word:shashazhashang|shashazhashang]] || [[word:kakazhashang|kakazhashang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhashang|thazhashang]] || [[word:jazhashang|jazhashang]] || [[word:shazhashang|shazhashang]] || [[word:kazhashang|kazhashang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhashang|thazhashang]] || [[word:jazhashang|jazhashang]] || [[word:shazhashang|shazhashang]] || [[word:kazhashang|kazhashang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhashang|shazhashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhashang|goshazhashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhashang|gokishazhashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhashangnﾃｼ|shazhashangnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhashangnknﾃｼ|goshazhashangnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhashangnﾃｼ|gokishazhashangnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhashangshﾃｫ|shazhashangshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkshﾃｫ|goshazhashangnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhashangshﾃｫ|gokishazhashangshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhashangro|shazhashangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkro|goshazhashangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhashangro|gokishazhashangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhashangmu|shazhashangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkmu|goshazhashangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhashangmu|gokishazhashangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhashangsher|shazhashangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhashangnksher|goshazhashangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhashangsher|gokishazhashangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhashang|shazhashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkng|goshazhashangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhashang|gokishazhashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhashangya|shazhashangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkya|goshazhashangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhashangya|gokishazhashangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhashangyam|shazhashangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkyam|goshazhashangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhashangyam|gokishazhashangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhashangnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shazhashangnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhashangnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshazhashangnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhashangnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishazhashangnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhashangnﾃｼro|shazhashangnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhashangnknﾃｼro|goshazhashangnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhashangnﾃｼro|gokishazhashangnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhashangnﾃｼmu|shazhashangnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhashangnknﾃｼmu|goshazhashangnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhashangnﾃｼmu|gokishazhashangnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhashangshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shazhashangshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshazhashangnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhashangshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishazhashangshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhashangshﾃｫro|shazhashangshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkshﾃｫro|goshazhashangnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhashangshﾃｫro|gokishazhashangshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhashangshﾃｫmu|shazhashangshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkshﾃｫmu|goshazhashangnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhashangshﾃｫmu|gokishazhashangshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhashangronﾃｼ|shazhashangronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkronﾃｼ|goshazhashangnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhashangronﾃｼ|gokishazhashangronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhashangroshﾃｫ|shazhashangroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkroshﾃｫ|goshazhashangnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhashangroshﾃｫ|gokishazhashangroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhashangromu|shazhashangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkromu|goshazhashangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhashangromu|gokishazhashangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhashangmunﾃｼ|shazhashangmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkmunﾃｼ|goshazhashangnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhashangmunﾃｼ|gokishazhashangmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhashangmushﾃｫ|shazhashangmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkmushﾃｫ|goshazhashangnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhashangmushﾃｫ|gokishazhashangmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhashangmuro|shazhashangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhashangnkmuro|goshazhashangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhashangmuro|gokishazhashangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
